name: HRA_TMPL_DEFNS_VL
query: SELECT TD.TEMPLATE_DEFN_ID, TD.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, TD.SET_ID, TD.DOC_TYPE_ID, TD.PROCESS_FLOW_ID, TDTL.NAME, TDTL.COMMENTS, TD.STATUS_CODE, TD.ROUNDING_RULE_CODE, TD.DECIMAL_PLACES, TD.CALCULATE_RATINGS_FLAG, TD.MAPPING_METHOD_CODE, TD.SHOW_PARTICIPANT_NAMES, TD.SELECT_MGR_ALLOWED_FLAG, TD.DATE_FROM, TD.DATE_TO, TD.STAR_RATING_ENABLED_FLAG, TD.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, TD.ATTRIBUTE1, TD.ATTRIBUTE2, TD.ATTRIBUTE3, TD.ATTRIBUTE4, TD.ATTRIBUTE5, TD.ATTRIBUTE6, TD.ATTRIBUTE7, TD.ATTRIBUTE8, TD.ATTRIBUTE9, TD.ATTRIBUTE10, TD.ATTRIBUTE11, TD.ATTRIBUTE12, TD.ATTRIBUTE13, TD.ATTRIBUTE14, TD.ATTRIBUTE27, TD.ATTRIBUTE28, TD.ATTRIBUTE29, TD.ATTRIBUTE30, TD.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, TD.CREATED_BY, TD.CREATION_DATE, TD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, TD.LAST_UPDATED_BY, TD.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, TD.DIGITAL_SIGNATURE_FLAG, TD.KUDOS_REGION_FLAG, TD.SET_ROLE_MINIMUMS_FLAG, TD.SET_ROLE_MAXIMUMS_FLAG, TD.TOTAL_MIN_PARTICIPANTS, TD.TOTAL_MAX_PARTICIPANTS, TD.ENFORCE_MIN_PCPNS_FLAG, TD.USE_WRK_CONNECTIONS_FLAG, TD.WRK_SEE_MGR_PCPN_FLAG, TD.PCPN_FEEDBACK_REQ_FLAG, TD.PCPN_DECLINE_OPTION_FLAG, TD.MODULE_ID, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, TD.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, TD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1, TD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2, TD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3, TD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE4, TD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE5, TD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE6, TD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE7, TD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE8, TD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE9, TD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE10, TD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE11, TD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE12, TD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE13, TD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE14, TD.ATTRIBUTE_DATE15, TD.SHOW_WKR_CALC_RATING_FLAG, TD.SHOW_MGR_CALC_RATING_FLAG, TD.USE_CALC_RATINGS_FLAG, TD.AUTO_POPULATE_MM_FLAG, TD.SEND_REQUEST_TO_MM_FLAG, TD.DEFAULT_MATRIX_PCPN_ROLE_ID, TD.SHOW_MM_CALC_RATING_FLAG, TD.SHOW_PCPN_CALC_RATING_FLAG, TD.TEMPLATE_TYPE_CODE, TD.ESS_REQUEST_ID, TD.ESS_REQUEST_STATUS, TD.SHOW_CHECK_IN_REGION_FLAG, TD.SHOW_FEEDBACK_REQ_REGION_FLAG, TD.ENABLE_SYNC_FLAG, TD.ALLOW_WKR_SELECT_MM_ROLE_FLAG, TD.ALLOW_MGR_SELECT_MM_ROLE_FLAG, TD.ALL_MM_MGR_TYPE_FLAG, TD.MM_MANAGER_TYPES, TD.MIN_LENGTH_COMMENTS, TD.MAX_LENGTH_COMMENTS, TD.SHOW_CHECK_IN_SUMMARY_FLAG, TD.SHOW_FEEDBACK_REQ_SUMMARY_FLAG FROM HRA_TMPL_DEFNS_B TD, HRA_TMPL_DEFNS_TL TDTL WHERE TD.TEMPLATE_DEFN_ID = TDTL.TEMPLATE_DEFN_ID AND TD.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = TDTL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND TDTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
